title: Add non-record 4xH100 10L Int5-MLP submission
author: ReNothingg

data.description: Int5 quantization applied specifically to MLP layers
Use of built-in gradient accumulation behavior with 4 GPUs and 1200-second wallclock cap

novel_contributions: Rerun of 10L Int5-MLP recipe on 4xH100 GPUs with 1200s wallclock cap
Use of built-in gradient accumulation behavior for multi-GPU training
Submission targeted for non-record track, not main 10-minute 8xH100 leaderboard
